content.json:
# 🔐 Azure Landing Zone Compliance Dashboard

Real-time compliance monitoring and audit trail for policy enforcement.

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant'), NonCompliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'), Unknown=countif(properties.complianceState == 'Unknown')
| extend CompliancePercentage=round((Compliant*100.0)/Total, 1)
| project CompliancePercentage, CompliantResources=Compliant, NonCompliantResources=NonCompliant, UnknownResources=Unknown
content.title: Policy Compliance Summary

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant'), NonCompliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant') by policyDefinitionName=properties.policyDefinitionName
| extend CompliancePercent=round((Compliant*100.0)/Total, 1)
| top 20 by NonCompliant desc
| project PolicyName=policyDefinitionName, Total, Compliant, NonCompliant, CompliancePercent
content.title: Non-Compliance by Policy

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.timestamp > ago(30d)
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant') by bin(properties.timestamp, 1d)
| extend CompliancePercent=round((Compliant*100.0)/Total, 1)
| order by timestamp asc
| project timestamp, CompliancePercent, Compliant, Total
content.title: Compliance Trend

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| project ResourceName=tostring(split(properties.resourceId, '/')[(-1)]), ResourceType=tostring(split(properties.resourceId, '/')[(-3)]), PolicyName=properties.policyDefinitionName, Timestamp=properties.timestamp
| top 50 by Timestamp desc
content.title: Recent Non-Compliant Resources

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where OperationName contains 'Remediation'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize Attempts=count(), Successful=countif(ActivityStatus == 'Succeeded'), Failed=countif(ActivityStatus == 'Failed') by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend SuccessRate=round((Successful*100.0)/(Attempts), 1)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Auto-Remediation Results (Last 7 Days)

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where ResourceProvider contains 'Policy' or OperationName contains 'Compliance'
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ActivityStatus, Caller, ResourceGroup, Details=tostring(Properties)
content.title: Recent Policy Activity
